graded_findings.rationale: The finding identifies a direct contradiction between the PR's documented highly-available built-in Metastore posture and ADR-002's production-HA guidance toward ETCD. Because the source evidence also says the runtime still supports only a singular Metastore head, this is a substantive adherence gap that should stop merge.

The finding shows the PR introducing a multi-authority Metastore configuration model without corresponding consensus, replication, or failover implementation. That conflicts with the accepted single metadata-authority model and is not merely documentation drift.
